sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115817" key="yofomh/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψοφο-μήδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n115817.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meditating noise, noisy, uproarious,</tr_> epith. of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
